ddls:
CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the region */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the region was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the region was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "divisions" (
  "division_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each division */,
  "division_name" TEXT /* Name of the division */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region the division belongs to */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the division */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the division was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the division was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("division_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_divisions_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state */,
  "division_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the division the state belongs to */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the state */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the state was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the state was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_states_division_id FOREIGN KEY ("division_id") REFERENCES divisions ("division_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "counties" (
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each county */,
  "county_name" TEXT /* Name of the county */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state the county belongs to */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the county */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the county was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the county was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("county_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_counties_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "population_estimates" (
  "estimate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each population estimate */,
  "sumlev" INTEGER /* Reference to the geographic area */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year for the population estimate */,
  "population_estimate" INTEGER /* Estimated population for the year */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the population estimate was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the population estimate was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("estimate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, analyst, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who created the report */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the report */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the report was created */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the report */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the report the comment is on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who made the comment */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Content of the comment */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the comment was created */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the comment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the comment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reports ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "visualizations" (
  "visualization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visualization */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who created the visualization */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the visualization */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the visualization was created */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of visualization (e.g., chart, graph, map) */,
  "data" TEXT /* Data used to create the visualization */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the visualization was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the visualization was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visualization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visualizations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "sumlev" INTEGER /* Reference to the geographic area accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access log was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access log was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_downloads" (
  "download_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each download event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who downloaded the data */,
  "sumlev" INTEGER /* Reference to the geographic area of the downloaded data */,
  "download_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was downloaded */,
  "data_format" TEXT /* Format of the downloaded data (e.g., CSV, JSON) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the download log was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the download log was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("download_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_downloads_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_exports" (
  "export_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each export event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who exported the data */,
  "sumlev" INTEGER /* Reference to the geographic area of the exported data */,
  "export_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was exported */,
  "data_format" TEXT /* Format of the exported data (e.g., CSV, JSON) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the export log was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the export log was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("export_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_exports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_shares" (
  "share_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each share event */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the report being shared */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who shared the report */,
  "share_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was shared */,
  "share_url" TEXT /* URL of the shared report */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the share log was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the share log was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("share_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_shares_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_shares_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reports ("report_id")
)
